stemHtml: What is the objective of SERA Regulation (EU) No 923/2012?

options.a: To establish the common rules of the air and operational provisions regarding services and procedures in air navigation applicable to general air traffic within the scope of Regulation (EC) No 551/2004.
options.b: To lay down common requirements for authorities and qualified entities exercising certification, oversight, and enforcement.
options.c: To establish common requirements for ATM/ANS provision and network functions.
options.d: To lay down detailed rules for commercial air transport operations including ramp inspections.
